CNF.label: CNF Workloads
CNF.summary: Order taken directly from the 'Upgrade Sequence for CNF Workloads' flowchart: Airgap → Telco Cloud Automation → Harbor → Avi Load Balancer → Tanzu Kubernetes Management Cluster → AKO → Tanzu Kubernetes Workload Cluster, then (for a full-stack upgrade) Aria Automation Orchestrator → NSX → vSphere (vCenter → ESXi → vSAN) for the management and each resource domain.

order.conditional: Only if an Airgap Server is deployed.
Only if Harbor for CNFs is deployed (4.0.1+).
Only if Avi Load Balancer is installed.
Only if AKO is installed in the workload cluster. Verify AKO/Kubernetes compatibility first.

VNF.label: VNF Workloads
VNF.summary: Order taken from the numbered 'Upgrade Sequence for VNF Workloads' table, applied across the Management, Resource & Edge, and Disaster Recovery pods: VMware Cloud Director → vSphere Replication → Live Site Recovery → NSX (Edge → host VIBs → Manager) → vCenter → ESXi & vSAN → Aria products → Avi Load Balancer.

order.conditional: Only if Avi Load Balancer is installed.
